title: message.event
description: Reliable event reporting a single point-in-time message. Sent by a source device. Persisted, increments space_revision by 1, and is broadcast to every viewer subscribed to the space; MAY also trigger a push notification. Shares the same device_seq counter as task.event (see common.schema.json#/$defs/device_seq) and uses the same (device_id, device_seq) deduplication and resend rules.

message_id.description: Unique id for this message. SHOULD be deterministically derivable from (device_id, device_seq) but MUST be sent explicitly rather than re-derived by the receiver, so the wire format stays self-contained.
